{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.5": 4, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent provides detailed feedback on the section's conceptual issues and reorganization suggestions, which goes beyond surface phrasing without changing the core object.",
    "R1.5": "The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationales for each part of the reorganization.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags multiple instances of uncertainty and overclaiming, providing confidence in its assessment.",
    "RX.3": "The agent identifies specific sections that are out of scope or overly broad, suggesting a more precise active set.",
    "RX.4": "While the agent does not introduce new errors, it points out several places where claims may be misleading or unsupported by evidence.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed suggestions for improvement but does not trace every change to its source."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent provides detailed feedback on the section's conceptual issues and reorganization suggestions, which goes beyond surface phrasing without changing the core object.
rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationales for each part of the reorganization.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags multiple instances of uncertainty and overclaiming, providing confidence in its assessment.
rationale.RX.3: The agent identifies specific sections that are out of scope or overly broad, suggesting a more precise active set.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent does not introduce new errors, it points out several places where claims may be misleading or unsupported by evidence.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed suggestions for improvement but does not trace every change to its source.
